name: Pumpkin Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together all ingredients except the last 3 and beat well.
2. Pour the pumpkin mixture into a lightly greased 9x13 in. pan.
3. Sprinkle the dry yellow cake mix and 1 cup of chopped nuts over the top of the pumpkin mixture.
4. Drizzle melted margarine over everything.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes.
